text: ‘And would have this lament of his, The Bow, taught to the sons of Juda’; literally, according to the Hebrew text, ‘and he said to teach the sons of Juda the bow’.
The word ‘Gelboe’ is not in the original, but some such addition would seem necessary to the sense.
The last nine words of this verse are not in the Hebrew text, nor in the Septuagint Greek.
